title: Overtune is building a ‘virtual music studio’ for Roblox - Music Ally
text:
We know Icelandic startup Overtune best for its music-creation app. We last wrote about it in April when the company
raised its latest round of funding
and debuted a GenAI tool called ‘LoopGen’. Now the company is working on an interesting expansion: a “virtual music studio” on Roblox.
The experience will use Overtune’s existing ‘Sequencer’ tech to create music and perform it to a virtual audience.
The startup is working with Roblox-focused accelerator LFG Studio on the project, which is currently in test mode. “We’re bringing the power of music creation into a social, gamified environment where everyone can participate, whether performing or spectating,” said CEO Sigurdur Arnason.
Roblox is fully on board with the project too: “It gives our community the tools to make music together in a fun, accessible way – and we can’t wait to hear the incredible tracks that come from it,” said its music partnerships lead Jessica Meehan.
The obvious comparison here is Splash, which also started as a music-making app before
pivoting into a popular social Roblox music-creation game
.
Stuart Dredge
Music Ally's Head of Insight
More by Stuart Dredge
